name: amcp-tauri-app
description: Rust + Tauri rewrite of ASR Model Comparison Platform

scripts.server:whisper: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features whisper --bin amcp-server -- server --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.server:whisper:vulkan: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features whisper-vulkan --bin amcp-server -- server --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --accelerator gpu
scripts.server:whisper:cuda: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features whisper-cuda --bin amcp-server -- server --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --accelerator gpu
scripts.server:qwen: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features qwen --bin amcp-server -- server --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.server:qwen:cuda: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features qwen-cuda --bin amcp-server -- server --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --accelerator gpu
scripts.server:qwen:metal: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features qwen-metal --bin amcp-server -- server --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --accelerator gpu
scripts.server:full-runtime: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features full-runtime --bin amcp-server -- server --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --accelerator gpu
scripts.server:macos:full-runtime: AMCP_VOXTRAL_RUNTIME=llamacpp cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features full-runtime-macos --bin amcp-server -- server --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --accelerator gpu
scripts.server:voxtral: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:AMCP_VOXTRAL_RUNTIME='llamacpp'; cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features voxtral --bin amcp-server -- server --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --accelerator gpu"
scripts.server:voxtral:llamacpp: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:AMCP_VOXTRAL_RUNTIME='llamacpp'; cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features voxtral,voxtral-llamacpp-vulkan --bin amcp-server -- server --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --accelerator gpu"
scripts.server:voxtral:llamacpp:realtime: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:AMCP_VOXTRAL_RUNTIME='llamacpp'; cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features voxtral --bin amcp-server -- server --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --accelerator gpu"
scripts.validate:windows:whisper: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features whisper --bin amcp-server -- validate
scripts.validate:windows:qwen: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features qwen --bin amcp-server -- validate
scripts.validate:windows:qwen:cuda: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features qwen-cuda --bin amcp-server -- validate
scripts.validate:windows:voxtral: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:AMCP_VOXTRAL_RUNTIME='llamacpp'; cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features voxtral --bin amcp-server -- validate"
scripts.validate:windows:voxtral:llamacpp: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:AMCP_VOXTRAL_RUNTIME='llamacpp'; cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features voxtral,voxtral-llamacpp-vulkan --bin amcp-server -- validate"
scripts.validate:windows:voxtral:llamacpp:realti: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:AMCP_VOXTRAL_RUNTIME='llamacpp'; cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features voxtral --bin amcp-server -- validate"
scripts.validate:macos:whisper: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features whisper-metal --bin amcp-server -- validate
scripts.validate:macos:qwen: cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features qwen-metal --bin amcp-server -- validate
scripts.validate:macos:voxtral: AMCP_VOXTRAL_RUNTIME=executorch cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features voxtral-realtime-metal --bin amcp-server -- validate
scripts.validate:macos:voxtral:executorch: AMCP_VOXTRAL_RUNTIME=executorch cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features voxtral-executorch --bin amcp-server -- validate
scripts.validate:macos:voxtral:llamacpp: AMCP_VOXTRAL_RUNTIME=llamacpp cargo run --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --features voxtral-llamacpp-realtime-patched,voxtral-realtime-metal --bin amcp-server -- validate
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run test:e2e
